meta.title: Atlantic Blue Diving | Diving Centre in Galicia
meta.description: Professional diving centre in Galicia offering PADI courses, Discover Scuba Diving experiences and guided dives along the Atlantic coast.
meta.keywords: diving galicia, diving centre, PADI courses, discover scuba diving, guided dives, atlantic ocean
meta.author: Elena Guardia

hero.title: Discover a world that only a few people ever get to experience.
hero.description: From your very first breath underwater to advanced diving adventures, we offer unforgettable experiences for every level.

services.title: Choose Your Next Adventure
services.description: Whether you've never dived before or you're ready for your next certification, we have the perfect experience waiting for you.

discover.title: Discover Scuba Diving
discover.description: Experience your very first dive accompanied by a certified instructor at all times.

courses.title: PADI Courses
courses.description: Earn internationally recognised certifications and continue your diving journey.

dives.title: Guided Dives
dives.description: Explore wrecks, walls, caves and some of the Atlantic's most spectacular dive sites.

about.title: Your Safety Always Comes First.
about.description: Our team consists of certified instructors with thousands of logged dives and a genuine passion for the ocean.

marineLife.title: Some of the Species You May Encounter

gallery.title: Discover the Atlantic from Beneath the Surface
gallery.description: Every dive tells a different story. Here are just a few unforgettable moments captured beneath the waves.

experiences.title: Experience the Ocean Like Never Before

boat.title: Boat Trips
boat.description: Reach exclusive dive sites accessible only by boat.

night.title: Night Diving
night.description: Discover a completely different underwater world after sunset.

wreck.title: Historic Wrecks
wreck.description: History, adventure and marine life combined in unforgettable dives.

review1.text: My Discover Scuba Diving experience was incredible. I felt completely safe from the very first minute.
review1.author: Laura M.

review2.text: Excellent equipment, perfect organisation and breathtaking dive sites.
review2.author: Pablo R.

review3.text: We'll definitely come back next year. One of the highlights of our holiday.
review3.author: Marta & Sergio

cta.title: Your Next Adventure Starts Underwater.
cta.description: Get in touch with us and find the perfect diving experience for you.

contact.title: Let's Talk About Your Next Dive
contact.description: Questions about our courses, Discover Scuba experiences or guided dives? We'd love to help.

footer.description: Exploring the Atlantic with passion, safety and respect for the marine environment.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Atlantic Blue Diving · Designed and developed by Elena Guardia.
